overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian robes walking along a desert trail lined with palm trees. The character travels from an inland path toward the Nile river, encountering wildlife including a grazing cow and a crossing dog, before walking along the riverbank and turning back inland.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert oasis trail with scattered date palms

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the desert trail surrounded by palm trees and scrub vegetation

entered.detail: sandy dirt path winding through the oasis
cluster of date palm trees with green fronds
scattered palm trees on the right side of the trail
rocky desert mountains visible on the horizon
dry grass and small bushes lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sandy desert trail surrounded by scattered date palm trees under a clear blue sky. The landscape features dry scrub vegetation and distant desert mountains, with birds occasionally visible flying overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail with grazing livestock and distant river view

events.description: white cow comes into view grazing on the left side of the path
Nile river becomes visible on the left horizon beyond the palm trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail passing by grazing animals on the left

notable_agents.action: white cow grazing peacefully beside the trail among the palm trees

entered.detail: wide blue river visible in the distance beyond the palm grove

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses along the trail, a white cow becomes visible grazing among the palms on the left. The Nile river appears on the distant horizon, marking the transition from inland desert toward the river valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside trail approaching the water's edge

events.description: black dog or jackal runs across the trail from right to left
trail becomes more grassy as it approaches the riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking along the path as a dog crosses ahead, approaching the river

notable_agents.action: black dog running quickly across the path from right to left

segments.scene_description: A black dog suddenly crosses the path from right to left as the character approaches the river. The vegetation becomes denser and greener near the water, and the Nile river grows from a distant blue line to a prominent feature on the left side of the trail.

events.description: walking directly alongside the Nile river with clear view of the water and opposite bank
trail curves to the right moving away from the river back toward inland

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank enjoying the waterfront view before turning inland

segments.scene_description: The character walks directly alongside the Nile river with clear views of the water and the distant shore lined with palm trees. The path then curves away from the river, heading back inland as the river recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a sandy desert trail that gradually transitions into a lush river valley before curving back toward the arid interior. It begins with the character walking through a dry landscape of scattered date palms and scrub vegetation under a clear blue sky with birds flying overhead. As the character progresses, a white cow appears grazing among the trees while the Nile river emerges as a distant blue line on the horizon. The scene then shifts toward denser, greener vegetation as a black dog crosses the path, and the river expands into a prominent feature on the left side of the trail. Finally, the camera follows the character walking directly alongside the flowing water before the path curves away, leaving the river behind as the terrain returns to the inland desert.
